name_en: MCM New Soft Berlin Visetos Shoulder Bag, embodying the concept of combining elegance with portability, this bag is meticulously crafted as a miniaturized version of a classic suitcase. Nappa leather details and the edge-painted corners outlining the classic Visetos silhouette highlight the brand's craftsmanship. A double-zipper closure ensures the safety of small daily essentials inside the luxurious fabric lining. You can carry this exquisite bag by the soft leather handle or use the leather shoulder strap for hands-free functionality. Dimensions: 14-21-8, Style No.: 65014
